rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct description 'Poethewin' and accurate identification as a header with no associated amount, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini incorrectly associated amounts from a later line, and claude-haiku misread the description.

Selected gemini-flash for correct description and identification as a header with no amount, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the description. claude-haiku entirely missed this row and conflated its Row 2 with the image's Row 3.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and correct amount values (8, 16, 8) confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the presence of names but missed the amounts on this line. claude-haiku had significant errors in both description and amount, effectively misidentifying this entire row.
Combined best aspects: gpt-5-mini provided the most accurate description 'Mordenham fore'. gemini-flash correctly identified its 'header' row_type. Visual verification confirms both.

Selected gemini-flash for exact transcription of description 'Backgate { B. Esq.' including the brace, and accurate amount values (4, 0, 0), confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini misread the brace and subsequent text. claude-haiku provided an entirely incorrect description for this row.

Selected gemini-flash (and gpt-5-mini) for accurate description 'Boyce' and amount (4, 0, 0), confirmed by visual inspection. claude-haiku incorrectly added brackets to the description. This row showed consensus on amount and core description.

Selected gemini-flash for the most accurate description 'Porty Fines p Modenham' and correctly noting that this row forms part of a multi-line description for an amount on the subsequent row. gpt-5-mini misread 'Fines' as 'Ginny'. claude-haiku was incorrect.

rows.description: of Mr. Holworthy from an unknown Land
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the most accurate description 'of Mr. Holworthy from an unknown Land', confirmed by visual verification. All three extractors correctly identified the amount as 5 0 0. This row showed consensus on the amount.

Selected gemini-flash for the most accurate description 'Increment of Batley' (corrected to 'Battley' via visual verification, as the original has two 't's). All extractors correctly identified the row_type as 'header' and absence of amount.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Gent: Com:' and correct row_type 'entry', confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the final colon as a 'd'. claude-haiku made several transcription errors and classified it as a 'header', which is less precise.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate transcription of the abbreviated description 'Act Suppor'. All three extractors correctly identified the amount as 10 0 0 and row_type as 'entry'. gpt-5-mini interpreted the abbreviation, and claude-haiku misread it slightly. This row showed consensus on amount and type.

Selected gemini-flash for the most accurate transcription of 'Comm: Library' and for correctly identifying the small 'of' written above it, leading to a combined description 'of Comm: Library'. Visually confirmed no amount on this line. gpt-5-mini slightly misread 'Comm:' as 'Cont:'. claude-haiku completely missed this row.

Selected gemini-flash for its outstanding accuracy in transcribing 'Summ^a', the exact monetary values (210, 2, 6), and its expert interpretation of the trailing symbol as a 0.5 (half-penny) fraction, confirmed by visual verification and historical context. gpt-5-mini also identified the main values correctly but incorrectly dismissed the fraction. claude-haiku's extraction for the total line was entirely incorrect in description and pounds value.
